caveat: A contract award is a fact, not evidence of influence or wrongdoing. Sole-trader/individual supplier names are quarantined (personal data). name_truncated rows have a leading capital dropped in the OGP source and cannot be reconstructed safely; they are flagged and excluded from CRO matching. VALUE IS NOT SPEND: 'Awarded Value' is the estimated/awarded contract value; framework & DPS notices carry notional multi-year CEILINGS and multi-supplier frameworks repeat one ceiling across every supplier row. Only sum value_safe_to_sum, and even then label it 'awarded value, not actual expenditure'.
